name: Checklist
description: A simple, collaborative to-do list. Each placement is its own list — any member of the space can add tasks, cycle each task through three states (unstarted, in-progress, complete), drag to reorder, and delete. Non-members get a live read-only view. Items, ordering, and states are stored in a lightweight local SQLite database keyed by placement, and every change is pushed live to all viewers.
